title: Tesla bull drops blunt take on gold rival
full_text: Tesla bull Ross Gerber just took a sharp swing at Bitcoin (BTC). This comes at a time when "king crypto" has slipped below its $70,000 mark for the first time since April, while its rival, gold, continues to hold the fort in green. Gerber is the co-founder and CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth ...
